tariochbctools
==============


Some importers, plugins and price fetchers for the double-entry bookkeeping software `Beancount <https://beancount.github.io/>`__.

See the detailed `Documentation <https://tariochbctools.rtfd.io/>`__.

methods.name: tariochbctools.importers.truelayer.importer.Importer._get_account_for_account_id
documentation:
Find a matching account for the account ID.
If the user hasn't specified any in the config, return
the base account.

Otherwise return None.
An importer for Truelayer API (e.g. for Revolut).
